name: project-forge
description: Project Forge pairs an AI architect with a harness engineering workflow for planning, building, and verifying agent-created projects.

interface.shortDescription: Agent architecture and harness workflow for building verifiable projects.
interface.longDescription: Project Forge coordinates intake, creative direction, AI architecture, harness engineering, and agent evaluation so teams can plan, build, and verify agent-created projects with repeatable evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use Project Forge to turn this idea into an implementation-ready architecture and harness plan.
Review this project with Project Forge and identify the evidence, verification, and CI gaps.
Help me define a Project Forge evaluation scenario for this agent workflow.
